messages.content:
You are AI Layer P1: a page-model refinement specialist for an AI-first automation framework.
Return only valid JSON array data.
Preserve strong resource-backed semantics and approved element decisions when available.
Keep the page model meaningful, visible, and review-friendly.

Input JSON:

      "approved": true

      "approved": true
    },
    {
      "approvedName": "sign_in_button",
      "type": "button",
      "locator": "xpath=//ion-button[normalize-space(.)='SIGN IN']",
      "approved": true
    }
  ],
  "resource_file": {
    "file": "pom_pages/login_page/login_page.resource",
    "variables": [
      {
        "name": "HOME_BUTTON",
        "value": "xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='home'] or normalize-space(.)='home']"
      },
      {
        "name": "ARROW_BACK_BUTTON",
        "value": "xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='arrow back'] or normalize-space(.)='arrow back']"
      },
      {
        "name": "USER_NAME_TEXTBOX",
        "value": "xpath=//input[@name='ion-input-0']"
      },
      {
        "name": "PASSWORD",
        "value": "id=password"
      },
      {
        "name": "ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD",
        "value": "xpath=//input[@name='ion-input-1']"
      },
      {
        "name": "SIGN_IN_BUTTON",
        "value": "xpath=//ion-button[normalize-space(.)='SIGN IN']"
      }
    ],
    "keywords": [
      {
        "name": "Click Home Button",
        "args": [],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Click action for Home Button (button) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${HOME_BUTTON}    10s",
          "    Click Element    ${HOME_BUTTON}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Click Arrow Back Button",
        "args": [],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Click action for Arrow Back Button (button) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${ARROW_BACK_BUTTON}    10s",
          "    Click Element    ${ARROW_BACK_BUTTON}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Enter User Name",
        "args": [
          "${text}"
        ],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Enter text action for User Name (textbox) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    10s",
          "    Input Text    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    ${text}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Enter Ion Input",
        "args": [
          "${password}"
        ],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Enter password action for Ion Input (password) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${PASSWORD}    10s",
          "    Input Password    ${PASSWORD}    ${password}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Enter Ion Input 1",
        "args": [
          "${password}"
        ],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Enter password action for Ion Input 1 (password) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD}    10s",
          "    Input Password    ${ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD}    ${password}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Click Sign In Button",
        "args": [],
        "body": [
          "    [Documentation]    Click action for Sign In Button (button) using page object locator.",
          "    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}    10s",
          "    Click Element    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "source": "*** Settings ***\nResource    ../../resources/common_keywords.resource\n\n*** Variables ***\n${HOME_BUTTON}    xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='home'] or normalize-space(.)='home']\n${ARROW_BACK_BUTTON}    xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='arrow back'] or normalize-space(.)='arrow back']\n${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    xpath=//input[@name='ion-input-0']\n${PASSWORD}    id=password\n${ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD}    xpath=//input[@name='ion-input-1']\n${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}    xpath=//ion-button[normalize-space(.)='SIGN IN']\n\n*** Keywords ***\nClick Home Button\n    [Documentation]    Click action for Home Button (button) using page object locator.\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${HOME_BUTTON}    10s\n    Click Element    ${HOME_BUTTON}\n\nClick Arrow Back Button\n    [Documentation]    Click action for Arrow Back Button (button) using page object locator.\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${ARROW_BACK_BUTTON}    10s\n    Click Element    ${ARROW_BACK_BUTTON}\n\nEnter User Name\n    [Documentation]    Enter text action for User Name (textbox) using page object locator.\n    [Arguments]    ${text}\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    10s\n    Input Text    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    ${text}\n\nEnter Ion Input\n    [Documentation]    Enter password action for Ion Input (password) using page object locator.\n    [Arguments]    ${password}\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${PASSWORD}    10s\n    Input Password    ${PASSWORD}    ${password}\n\nEnter Ion Input 1\n    [Documentation]    Enter password action for Ion Input 1 (password) using page object locator.\n    [Arguments]    ${password}\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD}    10s\n    Input Password    ${ION_INPUT_1_PASSWORD}    ${password}\n\nClick Sign In Button\n    [Documentation]    Click action for Sign In Button (button) using page object locator.\n    Wait Until Element Is Visible    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}    10s\n    Click Element    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}\n"
  },
  "goal": "Review and refine the page review UI model for display. Prefer approved elements and resource-backed variables, preserve strong locator choices already present, keep only meaningful visible page elements, and return only valid JSON as an array of objects with keys approvedName, type, locator, approved. Do not invent elements that are not grounded in the extracted data, approved elements, or current resource file."
}
